Sender: Youssef Rustom Attar, Egyptian Antiquities Inspector at Giza Pyramids
Brief_Summary: This document is a record from May 4, 1938, initiated by Youssef Rustom Attar, the Egyptian Antiquities Inspector at Giza, detailing the receipt and payment for wood supplied by Ibrahim Ahmed El-Diwani, registered under ledger number 55.
English_Translation:
Egypt, May 4, 1938
From what is requested from His Excellency, the Egyptian Antiquities Inspector Youssef Rustom Attar of the Pyramids.
Registered in ledger number 55, month 4/1/4.
On May 4, 1938.

Ibrahim Ahmed El-Diwani
Rue Yacoub Nasrieh, Le Caire — Téléph. No. 42910

This is for the value of wood that was received after sorting, inspection, and acceptance.

Item | Quantity | Inches | Feet | Price
--- | --- | --- | --- | ---
Wood 400 x 400 | 40 | 400 | 400 | 160
Wood 400 x 400 | 40
Stamps_and_Annotations: Handwritten Arabic date: مصر في ٤ مايو سنة ١٩٣٨ (Egypt, May 4, 1938)
Handwritten Arabic annotation: قيد في السجل رقم ٥٥ بشهر ٤/١/٤ (Registered in ledger number 55, month 4/1/4)
Handwritten Arabic date: في ٤ مايو ١٩٣٨ (On May 4, 1938)
Confidence_Notes: The exact interpretation of the 'بوصة' (inches) and 'قدم' (feet) columns in the table, which both show '400' for 40 pieces of wood, is unclear and might represent a specific internal unit or a total dimension rather than individual piece dimensions. The second line of the table is incomplete.
Full_Transcription:
[Handwritten Arabic: مصر في ٤ مايو سنة ١٩٣٨]
[Handwritten Arabic: من المطلوب من حضرة معلم الآثار المصرى يوسف رستم عطار الأهرام]
[Handwritten Arabic: قيد في السجل رقم ٥٥ بشهر ٤/١/٤]
[Handwritten Arabic: في ٤ مايو ١٩٣٨]

[Handwritten Arabic: إبراهيم أحمد الديواني]
IBRAHIM AHMED EL-DIWANI
[Handwritten Arabic: شارع يعقوب بالناصرية بمصر - تليفون رقم ٤٢٩١٠]
Rue Yacoub Nasrieh, Le Caire — Téléph. No. 42910

[Handwritten Arabic: وذلك عن قيمة من أخشاب صار استلامها بعد الفرز والمعاينة والقبول]

[Handwritten Arabic: صنف] | [Handwritten Arabic: عدد] | [Handwritten Arabic: بوصة] | [Handwritten Arabic: قدم] | [Handwritten Arabic: سعر]
